title: BCYC SUMMER CAMP PROGRAM - 211info
text: BANDON COMMUNITY YOUTH CENTER BCYC SUMMER CAMP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a summer camp program which includes swimming, cooking, painting, gardening, STEM activities, outdoor play and fieldtrips. 101 11th Street SW Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Ages 6 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm from Monday, June 23, 2025-Friday, August 15, 2025 Email (541) 347-8336 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 347-8336 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $130 per week, scholarships available DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - AFTER-SCHOOL TIGER CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BANDON COMMUNITY YOUTH CENTER
